name: Western Union Money Order Only
description_short: Oklahoma City's Western Union Money Order Only at 4700 N Western Ave offers 24/7 money order and check cashing services.
description_long:
Located at 4700 N Western Ave in Oklahoma City, OK, this Western Union Money Order Only location is a standalone check-cashing store that operates 24 hours every day of the week. The store provides convenient access to essential financial services for Oklahoma City residents and visitors alike, with extended hours that accommodate your schedule whenever you need to handle money orders or check cashing.

This Oklahoma City location specializes in money orders and check cashing services. You can contact them at +1 405-521-1356 to inquire about rates, document requirements, or to confirm service availability before your visit.

If you're in Oklahoma City and need a money order or check cashing service, this 24-hour location makes it easy to handle financial transactions at any time. Bring a valid photo ID and any relevant documents when you visit. Western Union Money Order Only is a trusted service for secure money transfers and check cashing needs.
address: 4700 N Western Ave, Oklahoma City, OK 73118

company_info.headquarters: 4700 N Western Ave, Oklahoma City, OK 73118

pros: Massive agent network with 150+ locations visible in single state search, including rural areas underserved by banks
24/7 online transaction initiation through WU.com with flexible in-store completion during agent hours
Multi-language support across 6 languages including Spanish, Haitian Creole, and Vietnamese
Money orders available at retail locations with extended hours (some Circle K locations open until 11:59 PM)
Integrated services including bill payment, mobile top-up, prepaid cards, and inmate payments beyond money orders
Transaction tracking and account history features for money movement verification
Rewards program offering incentives for repeat users
cons: Service availability inconsistent—location finder explicitly notes "Money Order Services only" at select agents, limiting full functionality
Fees and pricing not disclosed on location-finding interface, requiring in-store inquiry or online estimation tool
Dependent on retail partner hours rather than dedicated locations, creating access limitations during off-hours
Historical regulatory and compliance scrutiny around money laundering and fraud prevention may create additional documentation requirements
Website navigation complexity with multiple menu options and payment method errors ('Orange wallet temporarily unavailable') affecting user experience
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers in rural areas without branch banking access
International remittance senders needing domestic cash pickup by family members
Consumers seeking money orders at extended retail hours (evenings/weekends) when banks are closed
Incarcerated individuals' family members making inmate commissary payments
diagnosis: Western Union's money order and cash services are best for consumers in underbanked areas without bank access, particularly those needing weekend/evening service or international remittance capabilities. The main caveat is that service availability varies significantly by agent location, fees are opaque upfront, and the distributed retail model means inconsistent service quality—verify specific agent capabilities and pricing before relying on this service.
services: Money order issuance at retail agent locations
Domestic money transfer with cash pickup
Online money transfer initiation (24/7 at WU.com)
Receiver management and delivery method updates
meta_description: Western Union Money Order Only at 4700 N Western Ave, Oklahoma City, OK. Open 24/7 for money orders and check cashing.
